name: Folding Safety Barricade
shortDescription: Portable folding barricade for temporary access control and cordoning.
longDescription: A lightweight, folding barricade for cordoning off maintenance areas, wet floors or restricted zones during inspections and installation work. Folds flat for storage and transport between sites, with a high-visibility red and white finish.

images.alt: Folding Safety Barricade supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
